blockerNotes: The PostgreSQL migration history and zero-drift gate now pass. The restricted application principal exposed a product defect in canonical membership resolution: Prisma joins the RLS-protected organization relation before transaction-local trusted context exists. The exact gateway and E2E spec are temporarily unlocked to derive role and organization from DB membership in two stages without trusting client orgId or weakening RLS.
